Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Text Ruling

Appearances via Zoom Conference
Naeem Salameh, Esq. DANFOURA LAW GROUP P.C. (415) 970-8012 Email: samer@danfouralaw.com, ATTORNEYS FOR PLAINTIFF ISA J. MUHAWIEH,
No other appearances

Matter is not contested. Pliantiff stipulates to Judge Pro Tem Andy Schwartz deciding today's motion. Plaintiff's counsel seeks clarification on Plaintiff's submitted proposed order.

Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ISA MUHAWIEH'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or, In The Alternative Further Sanctions is Granted. No opposition filed.

Plaintiff's submitted proposed order will be signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant To: 1. Provide Further Written Responses To Form Interrogatories General (Set One); 2. Provide Further Written Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One); 3. Provide Further Written Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One); And 4. Pay Monetary Sanctions.
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ISA MUHAWIEH's Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant To: 1. Provide Further Written Responses To Form Interrogatories General (Set One); 2. Provide Further Written Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One); 3. Provide Further Written Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One); And 4. Pay Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ISA J. MUHAWIEH'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OF "MUHAWIEH) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT YOHALMA MARTINEZ (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "MARTINEZ") TO PROVIDE FURTHER WRITTEN RESPONSES TO (1) CERTAIN FORM INTERROGATORIES; (2) WRITTEN RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; AND (3) FURTHER WRITTEN RESPONSE TO CERTAIN REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED.

ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL, COMPLET AND VERIFIED RESPONSE WITHOUT OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE NOS 2.5, 2.6, 12.1, 12.6, 17.1, 50.1, 50.2, 50.3, 50.4, 50.5, AND 50.6.
(2) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 1-156.
(3) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NOS,6, 7,8, 9, 11, 12, 15 AND 56.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF FIFTEEN HUNDRED DOLLARS ($1,500.00) PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED WITH ITS MOTION PAPERS A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH IS CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING EXCEPT FOR THE TIME IN WHICH DEFENDANT HAS TO RESPOND AND THE AMOUNT OF MONETARY SANCTIONS REQUESTED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE ORDER PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED WITH THE NECESSARY AMENDMENTS.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
